description: Style Notespykar's Summer Fest line comes up with all the trending styles this season. This top is a warm weather essential - style it over a white shirt or under a black blazer and look great either way. Product DetailsPurple top, has a V-neckline, half buttoned placket, a small patch pocket on the left chest, three quarter sleeves with elasticated and ribbed cuffs and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% cottonHand wash coldFlat dry in shadeWarm ironSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33) is wearing a size M
